changeSet.author: P70311
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO public.au_service (id, name) VALUES (nextval('au_service_seq'), 'getSectorAssociationById');

changeSet.author: P70311
changeSet.comment: Update rules and relevant tables for REGULATOR to view sector association details
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO public.au_rule (id, resource_type, resource_sub_type, handler, role_type, scope) VALUES (nextval('au_rule_seq'), 'SECTOR_ASSOCIATION', null, 'sectorAssociationAccessHandler', 'REGULATOR', null); INSERT INTO au_service_rule(service_id, rule_id) SELECT aus.id, aur.id FROM au_service aus, au_rule aur WHERE aus.name = 'getSectorAssociationById' AND aur.role_type = 'REGULATOR' AND aur.resource_type = 'SECTOR_ASSOCIATION' AND aur.resource_sub_type IS NULL AND aur.handler = 'sectorAssociationAccessHandler' AND aur.scope IS NULL;

changeSet.author: P70311
changeSet.comment: Update rules and relevant tables for SECTOR_USER to view sector association details
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO public.au_rule (id, resource_type, resource_sub_type, handler, role_type, scope) VALUES (nextval('au_rule_seq'), 'SECTOR_ASSOCIATION', null, 'sectorAssociationAccessHandler', 'SECTOR_USER', null); INSERT INTO au_service_rule(service_id, rule_id) SELECT aus.id, aur.id FROM au_service aus, au_rule aur WHERE aus.name = 'getSectorAssociationById' AND aur.role_type = 'SECTOR_USER' AND aur.resource_type = 'SECTOR_ASSOCIATION' AND aur.resource_sub_type IS NULL AND aur.handler = 'sectorAssociationAccessHandler' AND aur.scope IS NULL;

changeSet.author: P70311
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO public.au_service (id, name) VALUES (nextval('au_service_seq'), 'updateSectorAssociationDetails'); INSERT INTO public.au_service (id, name) VALUES (nextval('au_service_seq'), 'updateSectorAssociationContact');

changeSet.author: P70311
changeSet.comment: Populate the relevant tables to authorize a REGULATOR to EDIT the sector association details/contact

changeSet.author: P70311
changeSet.comment: Populate the relevant tables to authorize a SECTOR_USER to EDIT the sector association details/contact

changeSet.author: P70628
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO public.au_service (id, name) VALUES (nextval('au_service_seq'), 'getSectorAssociationSchemeBySectorAssociationId');

changeSet.author: P70628
changeSet.comment: Update rules and relevant tables for REGULATOR to view sector association scheme
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO au_service_rule(service_id, rule_id) SELECT aus.id, aur.id FROM au_service aus, au_rule aur WHERE aus.name = 'getSectorAssociationSchemeBySectorAssociationId' AND aur.role_type = 'REGULATOR' AND aur.resource_type = 'SECTOR_ASSOCIATION' AND aur.resource_sub_type IS null AND aur.handler = 'sectorAssociationAccessHandler' AND aur.scope IS NULL;

changeSet.author: P70628
changeSet.comment: Update rules and relevant tables for SECTOR_USER to view sector association scheme
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO au_service_rule(service_id, rule_id) SELECT aus.id, aur.id FROM au_service aus, au_rule aur WHERE aus.name = 'getSectorAssociationSchemeBySectorAssociationId' AND aur.role_type = 'SECTOR_USER' AND aur.resource_type = 'SECTOR_ASSOCIATION' AND aur.resource_sub_type IS NULL AND aur.handler = 'sectorAssociationAccessHandler' AND aur.scope IS NULL;

changeSet.author: P70628
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO public.au_service (id, name) VALUES (nextval('au_service_seq'), 'getSubsectorAssociationSchemeBySubsectorAssociationSchemeId');

changeSet.author: P70628
changeSet.comment: Update rules and relevant tables for REGULATOR to view sector association details
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO au_service_rule(service_id, rule_id) SELECT aus.id, aur.id FROM au_service aus, au_rule aur WHERE aus.name = 'getSubsectorAssociationSchemeBySubsectorAssociationSchemeId' AND aur.role_type = 'REGULATOR' AND aur.resource_type = 'SECTOR_ASSOCIATION' AND aur.resource_sub_type IS NULL AND aur.handler = 'sectorAssociationAccessHandler' AND aur.scope IS NULL;

changeSet.author: P70628
changeSet.comment: Update rules and relevant tables for SECTOR_USER to view sector association details
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO au_service_rule(service_id, rule_id) SELECT aus.id, aur.id FROM au_service aus, au_rule aur WHERE aus.name = 'getSubsectorAssociationSchemeBySubsectorAssociationSchemeId' AND aur.role_type = 'SECTOR_USER' AND aur.resource_type = 'SECTOR_ASSOCIATION' AND aur.resource_sub_type IS NULL AND aur.handler = 'sectorAssociationAccessHandler' AND aur.scope IS NULL;

changeSet.author: P70628
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO public.au_service (id, name) VALUES (nextval('au_service_seq'), 'generateGetSectorAssociationSchemeDocumentToken'); INSERT INTO public.au_service (id, name) VALUES (nextval('au_service_seq'), 'getSectorAssociationSchemeDocument');

changeSet.author: P70628
changeSet.comment: Update rules and relevant tables for REGULATOR to download sector documents
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO au_service_rule(service_id, rule_id) SELECT aus.id, aur.id FROM au_service aus, au_rule aur WHERE aus.name = 'generateGetSectorAssociationSchemeDocumentToken' AND aur.role_type = 'REGULATOR' AND aur.resource_type = 'SECTOR_ASSOCIATION' AND aur.resource_sub_type IS NULL AND aur.handler = 'sectorAssociationAccessHandler' AND aur.scope IS NULL; INSERT INTO au_service_rule(service_id, rule_id) SELECT aus.id, aur.id FROM au_service aus, au_rule aur WHERE aus.name = 'getSectorAssociationSchemeDocument' AND aur.role_type = 'REGULATOR' AND aur.resource_type = 'SECTOR_ASSOCIATION' AND aur.resource_sub_type IS NULL AND aur.handler = 'sectorAssociationAccessHandler' AND aur.scope IS NULL;

changeSet.author: P70628
changeSet.comment: Update rules and relevant tables for SECTOR_USER to download sector documents
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO au_service_rule(service_id, rule_id) SELECT aus.id, aur.id FROM au_service aus, au_rule aur WHERE aus.name = 'generateGetSectorAssociationSchemeDocumentToken' AND aur.role_type = 'SECTOR_USER' AND aur.resource_type = 'SECTOR_ASSOCIATION' AND aur.resource_sub_type IS NULL AND aur.handler = 'sectorAssociationAccessHandler' AND aur.scope IS NULL; INSERT INTO au_service_rule(service_id, rule_id) SELECT aus.id, aur.id FROM au_service aus, au_rule aur WHERE aus.name = 'getSectorAssociationSchemeDocument' AND aur.role_type = 'SECTOR_USER' AND aur.resource_type = 'SECTOR_ASSOCIATION' AND aur.resource_sub_type IS NULL AND aur.handler = 'sectorAssociationAccessHandler' AND aur.scope IS NULL;

changeSet.author: P70311
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO public.au_service (id, name) VALUES (nextval('au_service_seq'), 'inviteUserToSectorAssociation');

changeSet.author: P70311
changeSet.comment: Populate the relevant tables to authorize a regulator to invite a user to a sector association

changeSet.author: P70311

changeSet.author: P70628
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO public.au_service (id, name) VALUES (nextval('au_service_seq'), 'getSectorUserAuthoritiesBySectorAssociationId');

changeSet.author: P70628
changeSet.comment: Update rules and relevant tables for REGULATOR to view a list of sector users
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO au_service_rule(service_id, rule_id) SELECT aus.id, aur.id FROM au_service aus, au_rule aur WHERE aus.name = 'getSectorUserAuthoritiesBySectorAssociationId' AND aur.role_type = 'REGULATOR' AND aur.resource_type = 'SECTOR_ASSOCIATION' AND aur.resource_sub_type IS NULL AND aur.handler = 'sectorAssociationAccessHandler' AND aur.scope IS NULL;

changeSet.author: P70628
changeSet.comment: Update rules and relevant tables for SECTOR_USER to view a list of sector users
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO au_service_rule(service_id, rule_id) SELECT aus.id, aur.id FROM au_service aus, au_rule aur WHERE aus.name = 'getSectorUserAuthoritiesBySectorAssociationId' AND aur.role_type = 'SECTOR_USER' AND aur.resource_type = 'SECTOR_ASSOCIATION' AND aur.resource_sub_type IS NULL AND aur.handler = 'sectorAssociationAccessHandler' AND aur.scope IS NULL;

changeSet.author: P70628
changeSet.comment: Populate the relevant tables to authorize a REGULATOR to update sector association site contacts
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO public.au_service (id, name) VALUES (nextval('au_service_seq'), 'updateSectorAssociationSiteContacts'); INSERT INTO au_service_rule(service_id, rule_id) SELECT aus.id, aur.id FROM au_service aus, au_rule aur WHERE aus.name = 'updateSectorAssociationSiteContacts' AND aur.role_type = 'REGULATOR' AND aur.resource_type = 'CA' AND aur.resource_sub_type IS NULL AND aur.handler = 'caAccessHandler' AND aur.scope = 'EDIT_USER';

changeSet.author: P70311
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO public.au_service (id, name) VALUES (nextval('au_service_seq'), 'getSectorUserById');

changeSet.author: P70311
changeSet.comment: Populate the relevant tables to authorize a regulator to invite a user to a sector association
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO au_service_rule(service_id, rule_id) SELECT aus.id, aur.id FROM au_service aus, au_rule aur WHERE aus.name = 'getSectorUserById' AND aur.role_type = 'REGULATOR' AND aur.resource_type = 'SECTOR_ASSOCIATION' AND aur.resource_sub_type IS NULL AND aur.handler = 'sectorAssociationAccessHandler' AND aur.scope = 'EDIT_SECTOR_USER';

changeSet.author: P70311
changeSet.comment: Populate the relevant tables to authorize a sector user to invite a user to a sector association
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO au_service_rule(service_id, rule_id) SELECT aus.id, aur.id FROM au_service aus, au_rule aur WHERE aus.name = 'getSectorUserById' AND aur.role_type = 'SECTOR_USER' AND aur.resource_type = 'SECTOR_ASSOCIATION' AND aur.resource_sub_type IS NULL AND aur.handler = 'sectorAssociationAccessHandler' AND aur.scope = 'EDIT_SECTOR_USER';

changeSet.comment: Reset Sector User 2FA authorization rules

changeSet.author: P70311

changeSet.author: loukerip
changeSet.sql: UPDATE public.au_resource_scope_permission SET permission = 'PERM_OPERATOR_USERS_EDIT' WHERE resource_type = 'ACCOUNT' and role_type = 'REGULATOR' and scope = 'EDIT_USER';

changeSet.author: loukerip
bountasp@unisystems.gr
loukerip
changeSet.comment: Rename edit sector users scope from EDIT_SECTOR_USER to EDIT_USER

changeSet.author: P63979
changeSet.comment: Populate the relevant tables to authorize a user to update target unit accounts site contacts

changeSet.author: P70311
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO public.au_rule (id, resource_type, resource_sub_type, handler, role_type, scope) VALUES (nextval('au_rule_seq'), 'ACCOUNT', null, 'accountAccessHandler', 'SECTOR_USER', null); insert into au_service_rule(service_id, rule_id) select aus.id, aur.id from au_service aus, au_rule aur where aus.name='getAccountOperatorAuthorities' and aur.role_type='SECTOR_USER' and aur.resource_type='ACCOUNT' and aur.resource_sub_type is null and aur.handler='accountAccessHandler' and scope is null;

changeSet.author: P70311
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO public.au_resource_scope_permission (id, resource_type, resource_sub_type, scope, permission, role_type) VALUES (nextval('au_resource_scope_permission_seq'), 'ACCOUNT', null, 'EDIT_USER', 'PERM_OPERATOR_USERS_EDIT', 'SECTOR_USER'); INSERT INTO public.au_resource_scope_permission (id, resource_type, resource_sub_type, scope, permission, role_type) VALUES (nextval('au_resource_scope_permission_seq'), 'ACCOUNT', null, 'EDIT_USER', 'PERM_OPERATOR_USERS_EDIT', 'OPERATOR');

changeSet.author: P70311
changeSet.sql: insert into au_service_rule(service_id, rule_id) select aus.id, aur.id from au_service aus, au_rule aur where aus.name='getRequestDetailsByAccountId' and aur.role_type='SECTOR_USER' and aur.resource_type='ACCOUNT' and aur.resource_sub_type is null and aur.handler='accountAccessHandler' and scope is null;

P70383

changeSet.author: loukerip
changeSet.sql: insert into au_rule(id, resource_type, resource_sub_type, handler, role_type) values (nextval('au_rule_seq'), 'REQUEST_ACTION', 'TARGET_UNIT_ACCOUNT_CREATION_SUBMITTED', 'requestActionViewHandler', 'OPERATOR');

rollback.sql: delete from au_rule where resource_type = 'REQUEST_ACTION' and resource_sub_type = 'TARGET_UNIT_ACCOUNT_CREATION_SUBMITTED' and handler = 'requestActionViewHandler' and role_type = 'OPERATOR' and scope is null;

changeSet.author: loukerip
changeSet.sql: insert into au_rule(id, resource_type, resource_sub_type, handler, role_type) values (nextval('au_rule_seq'), 'REQUEST_ACTION', 'TARGET_UNIT_ACCOUNT_CREATION_SUBMITTED', 'requestActionViewHandler', 'REGULATOR');

rollback.sql: delete from au_rule where resource_type = 'REQUEST_ACTION' and resource_sub_type = 'TARGET_UNIT_ACCOUNT_CREATION_SUBMITTED' and handler = 'requestActionViewHandler' and role_type = 'REGULATOR' and scope is null;

changeSet.author: loukerip
changeSet.sql: insert into au_rule(id, resource_type, resource_sub_type, handler, role_type) values (nextval('au_rule_seq'), 'REQUEST_ACTION', 'TARGET_UNIT_ACCOUNT_CREATION_SUBMITTED', 'requestActionAccountBasedViewHandler', 'SECTOR_USER');

rollback.sql: delete from au_rule where resource_type = 'REQUEST_ACTION' and resource_sub_type = 'TARGET_UNIT_ACCOUNT_CREATION_SUBMITTED' and handler = 'requestActionAccountBasedViewHandler' and role_type = 'SECTOR_USER' and scope is null;

changeSet.author: bountasp

rollback.sql:
delete from au_service_rule where (service_id, rule_id) in (SELECT aus.id, aur.id FROM au_service aus, au_rule aur where aus.name = 'getRequestActionsByRequestId' and aur.role_type = 'SECTOR_USER' and aur.resource_type = 'REQUEST' and aur.resource_sub_type is null and aur.handler = 'requestAccountBasedAccessHandler' and aur.scope is null);
delete from au_rule where resource_type = 'REQUEST' and resource_sub_type is null and handler = 'requestAccountBasedAccessHandler' and role_type = 'SECTOR_USER' and scope is null;

changeSet.author: bountasp
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO au_service_rule(service_id, rule_id) SELECT aus.id, aur.id FROM au_service aus, au_rule aur where aus.name = 'getRequestDetailsById' and aur.role_type = 'SECTOR_USER' and aur.resource_type = 'REQUEST' and aur.resource_sub_type is null and aur.handler = 'requestAccountBasedAccessHandler' and aur.scope is null;

rollback.sql: delete from au_service_rule where (service_id, rule_id) in (SELECT aus.id, aur.id FROM au_service aus, au_rule aur where aus.name = 'getRequestDetailsById' and aur.role_type = 'SECTOR_USER' and aur.resource_type = 'REQUEST' and aur.resource_sub_type is null and aur.handler = 'requestAccountBasedAccessHandler' and aur.scope is null);

changeSet.author: P70383
changeSet.comment: Populate the services for update target unit account

changeSet.author: bountasp
changeSet.sql:
INSERT INTO au_service_rule(service_id, rule_id) SELECT s.id, r.id FROM au_service s cross join au_rule r where s.name = 'getRequestActionById' and r.resource_type = 'REQUEST_ACTION' and r.resource_sub_type = 'TARGET_UNIT_ACCOUNT_CREATION_SUBMITTED' and r.handler = 'requestActionViewHandler' and r.role_type in ('REGULATOR', 'OPERATOR') and r.scope is null;
INSERT INTO au_service_rule(service_id, rule_id) SELECT aus.id, aur.id FROM au_service aus, au_rule aur where aus.name = 'getRequestActionById' and aur.role_type = 'SECTOR_USER' and aur.resource_type = 'REQUEST_ACTION' and aur.resource_sub_type = 'TARGET_UNIT_ACCOUNT_CREATION_SUBMITTED' and aur.handler = 'requestActionAccountBasedViewHandler' and aur.scope is null;

rollback.sql:
delete from au_service_rule where (service_id, rule_id) in (SELECT aus.id, aur.id FROM au_service aus, au_rule aur where aus.name = 'getRequestActionById' and aur.role_type = 'SECTOR_USER' and aur.resource_type = 'REQUEST_ACTION' and aur.resource_sub_type = 'TARGET_UNIT_ACCOUNT_CREATION_SUBMITTED' and aur.handler = 'requestActionAccountBasedViewHandler' and aur.scope is null);
DELETE FROM au_service_rule WHERE (service_id, rule_id) IN ( SELECT aus.id, aur.id FROM au_service aus CROSS JOIN au_rule aur WHERE aus.name = 'getRequestActionById' AND aur.resource_type = 'REQUEST_ACTION' AND aur.resource_sub_type = 'TARGET_UNIT_ACCOUNT_CREATION_SUBMITTED' AND aur.handler = 'requestActionViewHandler' AND aur.scope IS NULL AND aur.role_type IN ('OPERATOR', 'REGULATOR') );

changeSet.author: apostolouk@unisystems.gr
apostolouk@unisystems.gr
apostolouk@unisystems.gr
P70628
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO public.au_rule (id, resource_type, resource_sub_type, handler, role_type, scope) VALUES (nextval('au_rule_seq'), 'REQUEST_TASK', 'APPLY_FOR_AN_UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT', 'requestTaskAccountBasedAccessHandler', 'SECTOR_USER', 'REQUEST_TASK_EXECUTE'); INSERT INTO public.au_resource_scope_permission (id, resource_type, resource_sub_type, scope, permission, role_type) VALUES (nextval('au_resource_scope_permission_seq'), 'REQUEST_TASK', 'APPLY_FOR_AN_UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT', 'REQUEST_TASK_EXECUTE', 'PERM_UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_APPLICATION_SUBMIT', 'SECTOR_USER');

rollback.sql: DELETE FROM public.au_rule WHERE resource_type = 'REQUEST_TASK' AND resource_sub_type = 'APPLY_FOR_AN_UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT' AND handler = 'requestTaskAccountBasedAccessHandler' AND role_type = 'SECTOR_USER' and scope = 'REQUEST_TASK_EXECUTE'; DELETE FROM public.au_resource_scope_permission WHERE resource_type = 'REQUEST_TASK' AND resource_sub_type = 'APPLY_FOR_AN_UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT' AND scope = 'REQUEST_TASK_EXECUTE' AND permission = 'PERM_UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_APPLICATION_SUBMIT' AND role_type = 'SECTOR_USER';

changeSet.author: P70311
changeSet.comment: Populate the relevant tables to authorize a user to view workflow task header
changeSet.rollback: DELETE FROM au_service_rule WHERE service_id = (SELECT id FROM au_service WHERE name = 'getAccountHeaderInfoById'); DELETE FROM au_service WHERE name = 'getAccountHeaderInfoById';

changeSet.author: bountasp
changeSet.sql: insert into au_service_rule(service_id, rule_id) select aus.id, aur.id from au_service aus, au_rule aur where aus.name = 'getAvailableAccountWorkflows' and aur.role_type = 'SECTOR_USER' and aur.resource_type = 'ACCOUNT' and aur.resource_sub_type is null and aur.handler = 'accountAccessHandler' and aur.scope is null;

rollback.sql: DELETE FROM au_service_rule where (service_id, rule_id) in (select aus.id, aur.id from au_service aus, au_rule aur where aus.name = 'getAvailableAccountWorkflows' and aur.role_type = 'SECTOR_USER' and aur.resource_type = 'ACCOUNT' and aur.resource_sub_type is null and aur.handler = 'accountAccessHandler' and aur.scope is null);

changeSet.author: P70628
P70628
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO au_service_rule(service_id, rule_id) SELECT aus.id, aur.id FROM au_service aus, au_rule aur WHERE aus.name in ('releaseTask', 'assignTask') AND aur.role_type = 'SECTOR_USER' AND aur.resource_type = 'REQUEST_TASK' AND aur.resource_sub_type IS NULL AND aur.handler = 'requestTaskAssignAccountBasedAccessHandler' AND aur.scope = 'REQUEST_TASK_ASSIGN';

rollback.sql: DELETE FROM au_service_rule WHERE (service_id, rule_id) IN ( SELECT aus.id, aur.id FROM au_service aus CROSS JOIN au_rule aur WHERE aur.resource_type = 'REQUEST_TASK' AND aur.resource_sub_type IS NULL AND aur.handler = 'requestTaskAssignAccountBasedAccessHandler' AND aur.scope = 'REQUEST_TASK_ASSIGN' AND aur.role_type = 'SECTOR_USER' AND aus.name IN ('releaseTask', 'assignTask') );

changeSet.author: loukerip
changeSet.sql: insert into au_service_rule(service_id, rule_id) select aus.id, aur.id from au_service aus, au_rule aur where aus.name='getItemsByRequest' and aur.role_type='SECTOR_USER' and aur.resource_type='REQUEST' and aur.handler='requestAccountBasedAccessHandler' and aur.resource_sub_type is null and scope is null;

rollback.sql: DELETE FROM au_service_rule WHERE (service_id, rule_id) IN ( SELECT aus.id, aur.id FROM au_service aus CROSS JOIN au_rule aur WHERE aur.resource_type = 'REQUEST' AND aur.handler = 'requestAccountBasedAccessHandler' AND aur.scope is null AND aur.resource_sub_type IS NULL AND aur.role_type = 'SECTOR_USER' AND aus.name = 'getItemsByRequest');

changeSet.author: P70383
P70383
changeSet.sql: insert into au_rule(id, resource_type, resource_sub_type, handler, role_type, scope) values (nextval('au_rule_seq'), 'REQUEST_TASK' , 'UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_APPLICATION_SUBMIT', 'requestTaskAccountBasedAccessHandler', 'SECTOR_USER', 'REQUEST_TASK_VIEW');

rollback.sql: delete from au_rule where resource_type = 'REQUEST_TASK' and resource_sub_type = 'UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_APPLICATION_SUBMIT' and handler = 'requestTaskAccountBasedAccessHandler' and role_type = 'SECTOR_USER' and scope = 'REQUEST_TASK_VIEW';

changeSet.author: P70383
changeSet.sql: insert into au_resource_scope_permission(id, resource_type, resource_sub_type, role_type, scope, permission) (select nextval('au_resource_scope_permission_seq'), 'REQUEST_TASK', 'UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_APPLICATION_SUBMIT', 'SECTOR_USER', 'REQUEST_TASK_VIEW', 'PERM_UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_APPLICATION_SUBMIT');

rollback.sql: delete from au_resource_scope_permission where resource_type = 'REQUEST_TASK' and resource_sub_type = 'UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_APPLICATION_SUBMIT' and scope = 'REQUEST_TASK_VIEW' and permission = 'PERM_UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_APPLICATION_SUBMIT' and role_type = 'SECTOR_USER';

changeSet.author: P70383
changeSet.sql:
insert into au_service_rule(service_id, rule_id) select s.id, r.id from au_service s cross join au_rule r where s.name in ('assignTask', 'getCandidateAssigneesByTaskId', 'releaseTask', 'getTaskItemInfoById', 'generateRequestTaskGetFileAttachmentToken') and r.resource_type = 'REQUEST_TASK' and r.resource_sub_type = 'UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_APPLICATION_SUBMIT' and r.handler = 'requestTaskAccountBasedAccessHandler' and r.role_type = 'SECTOR_USER' and r.scope = 'REQUEST_TASK_VIEW';
insert into au_service_rule(service_id, rule_id) select s.id, r.id from au_service s cross join au_rule r where s.name in ('processRequestTaskAction', 'uploadRequestTaskAttachment') and r.resource_type = 'REQUEST_TASK' and r.resource_sub_type = 'UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_APPLICATION_SUBMIT' and r.handler = 'requestTaskAccountBasedAccessHandler' and r.role_type = 'SECTOR_USER' and r.scope = 'REQUEST_TASK_EXECUTE';

rollback.sql:
delete from au_service_rule sr using au_rule r, au_service s where r.id = sr.rule_id and s.id = sr.service_id and s.name in ('assignTask', 'getCandidateAssigneesByTaskId', 'releaseTask', 'getTaskItemInfoById', 'generateRequestTaskGetFileAttachmentToken') and r.resource_type = 'REQUEST_TASK' and r.resource_sub_type = 'UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_APPLICATION_SUBMIT' and r.handler = 'requestTaskAccountBasedAccessHandler' and r.role_type = 'SECTOR_USER' and r.scope = 'REQUEST_TASK_VIEW';
delete from au_service_rule sr using au_rule r, au_service s where r.id = sr.rule_id and s.id = sr.service_id and s.name in ('processRequestTaskAction', 'uploadRequestTaskAttachment') and r.resource_type = 'REQUEST_TASK' and r.resource_sub_type = 'UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_APPLICATION_SUBMIT' and r.handler = 'requestTaskAccountBasedAccessHandler' and r.role_type = 'SECTOR_USER' and r.scope = 'REQUEST_TASK_EXECUTE';

changeSet.author: katsadourose
changeSet.sql:
INSERT INTO au_rule(id, resource_type, resource_sub_type, handler, role_type, scope) VALUES (nextval('au_rule_seq'), 'REQUEST_ACTION', 'ADMIN_TERMINATION_APPLICATION_CANCELLED', 'requestActionViewHandler', 'REGULATOR', NULL);
INSERT INTO au_service_rule(service_id, rule_id) SELECT aus.id, aur.id FROM au_service aus, au_rule aur WHERE aus.name = 'getRequestActionById' AND aur.role_type = 'REGULATOR' AND aur.resource_type = 'REQUEST_ACTION' AND aur.resource_sub_type = 'ADMIN_TERMINATION_APPLICATION_CANCELLED' AND aur.handler = 'requestActionViewHandler' AND aur.scope IS NULL;

rollback.sql:
DELETE FROM au_service_rule WHERE (service_id, rule_id) IN ( SELECT aus.id, aur.id FROM au_service aus, au_rule aur WHERE aus.name = 'getRequestActionById' AND aur.role_type = 'REGULATOR' AND aur.resource_type = 'REQUEST_ACTION' AND aur.resource_sub_type = 'ADMIN_TERMINATION_APPLICATION_CANCELLED' AND aur.handler = 'requestActionViewHandler' AND aur.scope IS NULL );
DELETE FROM au_rule WHERE resource_type = 'REQUEST_ACTION' AND resource_sub_type = 'ADMIN_TERMINATION_APPLICATION_CANCELLED' AND handler = 'requestActionViewHandler' AND role_type = 'REGULATOR' AND scope IS NULL;

changeSet.author: P70628

rollback.sql: DELETE FROM au_service_rule WHERE service_id = (SELECT id FROM au_service WHERE name = 'generateFacilityId'); DELETE FROM au_service WHERE name = 'generateFacilityId';

changeSet.author: P70383
P70383
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO public.au_service (id, name) VALUES (nextval('au_service_seq'), 'generateRequestActionGetFileAttachmentToken'); INSERT INTO public.au_service (id, name) VALUES (nextval('au_service_seq'), 'generateRequestActionGetFileDocumentToken');

changeSet.author: P70383
changeSet.sql:
insert into au_service_rule(service_id, rule_id) select s.id, r.id from au_service s cross join au_rule r where s.name in ('getRequestActionById', 'generateRequestActionGetFileAttachmentToken', 'generateRequestActionGetFileDocumentToken') and r.resource_type = 'REQUEST_ACTION' and r.resource_sub_type = 'ADMIN_TERMINATION_APPLICATION_SUBMITTED' and r.handler = 'requestActionViewHandler' and r.role_type in ('REGULATOR', 'OPERATOR') and r.scope is null;
insert into au_service_rule(service_id, rule_id) select s.id, r.id from au_service s cross join au_rule r where s.name in ('getRequestActionById', 'generateRequestActionGetFileAttachmentToken', 'generateRequestActionGetFileDocumentToken') and r.resource_type = 'REQUEST_ACTION' and r.resource_sub_type = 'ADMIN_TERMINATION_APPLICATION_SUBMITTED' and r.handler = 'requestActionAccountBasedViewHandler' and r.role_type = 'SECTOR_USER' and r.scope is null;

rollback.sql: delete from au_service_rule sr using au_rule r, au_service s where r.id = sr.rule_id and s.id = sr.service_id and s.name in ('getRequestActionById', 'generateRequestActionGetFileAttachmentToken', 'generateRequestActionGetFileDocumentToken') and r.resource_type = 'REQUEST_ACTION' and r.resource_sub_type = 'ADMIN_TERMINATION_APPLICATION_SUBMITTED' and r.scope is null;

changeSet.sql: update au_service_rule set rule_id = (select aur.id from au_rule aur where aur.role_type = 'SECTOR_USER' and aur.resource_type = 'ACCOUNT' and aur.resource_sub_type IS NULL and aur.handler = 'accountAccessHandler' and aur.scope IS NULL) where service_id = (select aus.id from au_service aus where aus.name = 'generateFacilityId');

rollback.sql: update au_service_rule set rule_id = (select aur.id from au_rule aur where aur.role_type = 'SECTOR_USER' and aur.resource_type = 'SECTOR_ASSOCIATION' and aur.resource_sub_type IS NULL and aur.handler = 'sectorAssociationAccessHandler' and aur.scope IS NULL) where service_id = (select aus.id from au_service aus where aus.name = 'generateFacilityId');

changeSet.author: apostolouk@unisystems.gr
changeSet.sql:
insert into au_service_rule(service_id, rule_id) select s.id, r.id from au_service s cross join au_rule r where s.name in ('getRequestActionById', 'generateRequestActionGetFileAttachmentToken', 'generateRequestActionGetFileDocumentToken') and r.resource_type = 'REQUEST_ACTION' and r.resource_sub_type = 'UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_APPLICATION_ACTIVATED' and r.handler = 'requestActionViewHandler' and r.role_type in ('REGULATOR', 'OPERATOR') and r.scope is null;
insert into au_service_rule(service_id, rule_id) select s.id, r.id from au_service s cross join au_rule r where s.name in ('getRequestActionById', 'generateRequestActionGetFileAttachmentToken', 'generateRequestActionGetFileDocumentToken') and r.resource_type = 'REQUEST_ACTION' and r.resource_sub_type = 'UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_APPLICATION_ACTIVATED' and r.handler = 'requestActionAccountBasedViewHandler' and r.role_type = 'SECTOR_USER' and r.scope is null;

rollback.sql: delete from au_service_rule sr using au_rule r, au_service s where r.id = sr.rule_id and s.id = sr.service_id and s.name in ('getRequestActionById', 'generateRequestActionGetFileAttachmentToken', 'generateRequestActionGetFileDocumentToken') and r.resource_type = 'REQUEST_ACTION' and r.resource_sub_type = 'UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_APPLICATION_ACTIVATED' and r.handler in ('requestActionViewHandler', 'requestActionAccountBasedViewHandler') and r.scope is null;

changeSet.author: loukerip

rollback.sql: delete from au_rule where resource_type = 'UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT' and handler = 'underlyingAgreementAccessHandler' and role_type IN ('OPERATOR', 'SECTOR_USER', 'REGULATOR') and scope is null;

changeSet.author: loukerip
changeSet.sql: insert into au_service(id, name) values (nextval('au_service_seq'), 'generateGetUnderlyingAgreementDocumentToken');

insert into au_service_rule(service_id, rule_id) select aus.id, aur.id from au_service aus cross join au_rule aur where aus.name = 'generateGetUnderlyingAgreementDocumentToken' and aur.resource_type = 'UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT' and aur.resource_sub_type is null and aur.handler = 'underlyingAgreementAccessHandler' and scope is null;

rollback.sql:
delete from au_service_rule where (service_id, rule_id) in (SELECT aus.id, aur.id FROM au_service aus, au_rule aur where aus.name = 'generateGetUnderlyingAgreementDocumentToken' and aur.resource_type = 'UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT' and aur.resource_sub_type is null and aur.handler = 'underlyingAgreementAccessHandler' and aur.scope is null);
delete from au_service where name = 'generateGetUnderlyingAgreementDocumentToken';

changeSet.author: apostolouk@unisystems.gr

rollback.sql: delete from au_rule where resource_type = 'REQUEST_ACTION' and resource_sub_type = 'UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_VARIATION_APPLICATION_ACCEPTED' and handler in ('requestActionViewHandler', 'requestActionAccountBasedViewHandler') and scope is null;

changeSet.author: apostolouk@unisystems.gr
changeSet.sql:
insert into au_service_rule(service_id, rule_id) select s.id, r.id from au_service s cross join au_rule r where s.name in ('getRequestActionById', 'generateRequestActionGetFileAttachmentToken', 'generateRequestActionGetFileDocumentToken') and r.resource_type = 'REQUEST_ACTION' and r.resource_sub_type = 'UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_VARIATION_APPLICATION_ACCEPTED' and r.handler = 'requestActionViewHandler' and r.role_type in ('REGULATOR', 'OPERATOR') and r.scope is null;
insert into au_service_rule(service_id, rule_id) select s.id, r.id from au_service s cross join au_rule r where s.name in ('getRequestActionById', 'generateRequestActionGetFileAttachmentToken', 'generateRequestActionGetFileDocumentToken') and r.resource_type = 'REQUEST_ACTION' and r.resource_sub_type = 'UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_VARIATION_APPLICATION_ACCEPTED' and r.handler = 'requestActionAccountBasedViewHandler' and r.role_type = 'SECTOR_USER' and r.scope is null;

rollback.sql: delete from au_service_rule sr using au_rule r, au_service s where r.id = sr.rule_id and s.id = sr.service_id and s.name in ('getRequestActionById', 'generateRequestActionGetFileAttachmentToken', 'generateRequestActionGetFileDocumentToken') and r.resource_type = 'REQUEST_ACTION' and r.resource_sub_type = 'UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_VARIATION_APPLICATION_ACCEPTED' and r.handler in ('requestActionViewHandler', 'requestActionAccountBasedViewHandler') and r.scope is null;

changeSet.author: P70311
P70311
P70311
changeSet.sql: insert into au_rule(id, resource_type, resource_sub_type, handler, role_type, scope) values (nextval('au_rule_seq'), 'REQUEST_TASK' , 'UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_VARIATION_WAIT_FOR_ACTIVATION', 'requestTaskAccountBasedAccessHandler', 'SECTOR_USER', 'REQUEST_TASK_VIEW');

insert into au_service_rule(service_id, rule_id) select s.id, r.id from au_service s cross join au_rule r where s.name in ('assignTask', 'releaseTask', 'getTaskItemInfoById', 'getCandidateAssigneesByTaskId') and r.resource_type = 'REQUEST_TASK' and r.resource_sub_type = 'UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_VARIATION_WAIT_FOR_ACTIVATION' and r.handler = 'requestTaskAccountBasedAccessHandler' and r.role_type = 'SECTOR_USER' and r.scope = 'REQUEST_TASK_VIEW';

insert into au_resource_scope_permission(id, resource_type, resource_sub_type, scope, permission, role_type) (select nextval('au_resource_scope_permission_seq'), 'REQUEST_TASK', 'UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_VARIATION_WAIT_FOR_ACTIVATION', 'REQUEST_TASK_VIEW', 'PERM_UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_VARIATION_SUBMIT', 'SECTOR_USER');

changeSet.author: P70311
changeSet.sql: insert into au_rule(id, resource_type, resource_sub_type, handler, role_type, scope) values (nextval('au_rule_seq'), 'REQUEST_TASK' , 'UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_VARIATION_WAIT_FOR_ACTIVATION', 'requestTaskAccountBasedAccessHandler', 'SECTOR_USER', 'REQUEST_TASK_EXECUTE');

insert into au_resource_scope_permission(id, resource_type, resource_sub_type, scope, permission, role_type) (select nextval('au_resource_scope_permission_seq'), 'REQUEST_TASK', 'UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_VARIATION_WAIT_FOR_ACTIVATION', 'REQUEST_TASK_EXECUTE', 'PERM_UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_VARIATION_SUBMIT', 'SECTOR_USER');

rollback.sql:
delete from au_resource_scope_permission where resource_type = 'REQUEST_TASK' and resource_sub_type = 'UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_VARIATION_WAIT_FOR_ACTIVATION' and scope = 'REQUEST_TASK_EXECUTE' and permission = 'PERM_UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_VARIATION_SUBMIT' and role_type = 'SECTOR_USER';
delete from au_rule where resource_type = 'REQUEST_TASK' and resource_sub_type = 'UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_VARIATION_WAIT_FOR_ACTIVATION' and handler = 'requestTaskAccountBasedAccessHandler' and role_type = 'SECTOR_USER' and scope = 'REQUEST_TASK_EXECUTE';

changeSet.author: P70628

rollback.sql: delete from au_rule where resource_type = 'REQUEST_ACTION' and resource_sub_type = 'UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_VARIATION_APPLICATION_REJECTED' and handler in ('requestActionViewHandler', 'requestActionAccountBasedViewHandler') and scope is null;

changeSet.author: P70628
changeSet.sql:
insert into au_service_rule(service_id, rule_id) select s.id, r.id from au_service s cross join au_rule r where s.name in ('getRequestActionById', 'generateRequestActionGetFileAttachmentToken') and r.resource_type = 'REQUEST_ACTION' and r.resource_sub_type = 'UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_VARIATION_APPLICATION_REJECTED' and r.handler = 'requestActionViewHandler' and r.role_type in ('REGULATOR', 'OPERATOR') and r.scope is null;
insert into au_service_rule(service_id, rule_id) select s.id, r.id from au_service s cross join au_rule r where s.name in ('getRequestActionById', 'generateRequestActionGetFileAttachmentToken') and r.resource_type = 'REQUEST_ACTION' and r.resource_sub_type = 'UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_VARIATION_APPLICATION_REJECTED' and r.handler = 'requestActionAccountBasedViewHandler' and r.role_type = 'SECTOR_USER' and r.scope is null;

rollback.sql: delete from au_service_rule sr using au_rule r, au_service s where r.id = sr.rule_id and s.id = sr.service_id and s.name in ('getRequestActionById', 'generateRequestActionGetFileAttachmentToken') and r.resource_type = 'REQUEST_ACTION' and r.resource_sub_type = 'UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_VARIATION_APPLICATION_REJECTED' and r.handler in ('requestActionViewHandler', 'requestActionAccountBasedViewHandler') and r.scope is null;

changeSet.author: P70628
P70383
changeSet.sql:
insert into au_service (id, name) VALUES (nextval('au_service_seq'), 'getDefaultNoticeRecipients');
insert into au_service_rule(service_id, rule_id) select s.id, r.id from au_service s cross join au_rule r where s.name = 'getDefaultNoticeRecipients' and r.resource_type = 'REQUEST_TASK' and r.resource_sub_type in ('UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_APPLICATION_REVIEW', 'UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_APPLICATION_ACTIVATION', 'ADMIN_TERMINATION_APPLICATION_SUBMIT', 'ADMIN_TERMINATION_APPLICATION_WITHDRAW', 'ADMIN_TERMINATION_APPLICATION_FINAL_DECISION', 'UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_VARIATION_APPLICATION_REVIEW', 'UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_VARIATION_ACTIVATION') and r.handler = 'requestTaskAccessHandler' and r.role_type = 'REGULATOR' and r.scope = 'REQUEST_TASK_VIEW';

rollback.sql:
delete from au_service_rule sr using au_rule r, au_service s where r.id = sr.rule_id and s.id = sr.service_id and s.name = 'getDefaultNoticeRecipients' and r.resource_type = 'REQUEST_TASK' and r.resource_sub_type in ('UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_APPLICATION_REVIEW', 'UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_APPLICATION_ACTIVATION', 'ADMIN_TERMINATION_APPLICATION_SUBMIT', 'ADMIN_TERMINATION_APPLICATION_WITHDRAW', 'ADMIN_TERMINATION_APPLICATION_FINAL_DECISION', 'UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_VARIATION_APPLICATION_REVIEW', 'UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_VARIATION_ACTIVATION') and r.handler = 'requestTaskAccessHandler' and r.role_type = 'REGULATOR' and r.scope = 'REQUEST_TASK_VIEW';
delete from au_service where name = 'getDefaultNoticeRecipients';
